title: 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
display_title: 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 8:57 pm Darnit where did you find a copy of 2015!? I've been looking every where for one! Arrgghh!!! EM I bow down before your fandomness!

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:01 pm my fandom comes in immense knowledge, not merchandise

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:04 pm Yeah, but you don'nt have a copy of 2015! Man I would kill for that.... :cry: :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:09 pm whats 2015?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:13 pm It's a really cool book that I have looked everywhere for but has all been fruitless. It's a documentation of Kaji's spying stuff and has some really nice pictures and is printed in English and Japanese. As I said, I would kill for it...

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:14 pm sounds interesting

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:15 pm Not to mention expensive...

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:18 pm how much does it go for?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 9:19 pm I don;t know but considering it's a hardcover, imported, printed on glossy nice pages... I bettting a pretty peney.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:26 pm (I split the divergent discussion into its own thread) The only places I've ever seen 2015 available are convention dealer rooms, occasionally on Ebay, and at JPQueen. I got mine for about 50 bucks, shipping included. JPQueen actually has a lot of rare Eva books and doujinshi, worth taking a look at, you might see something you like. http://www.jpqueen.com/ Also, as I convention around a lot, I'm considering actually purchasing these rare books at cons and then selling them to you, the reader, as a service to you, as a way of saying, "Thanks for the support". And by selling, I mean paying for what I would pay, plus shipping. Anyone interested? I'm going to Otakon in three weeks, there is definitely bound to be several copies of 2015, maybe some Red Cross Books....

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:28 pm Interested? Hell yes! That would be a very, very kind thing of you to do Mr. Monkey. You are t3h r0x0rz!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:30 pm Sounds interesting . I must find a copy.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:35 pm Thank you O Monkey-Sama! I am forever in your debt! (Providing I ever find one....)

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Mon Jul 12, 2004 11:16 am The book is definately worth it. I have a copy, and it is beautiful. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Mon Jul 12, 2004 11:26 am Can the owners of 2015 give us poor people any ideas of what's in it. Like quotes from the book or something. Anyways, is 2015 considered canon, or is fan-created or what?

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Mon Jul 12, 2004 11:34 am I am in the process of finding this and other obscure eva books. I have always wanted to find a copy of The Red Cross book, but I have never seen any. So I would also be interested in buying a copy.

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Mon Jul 12, 2004 11:46 am Hey I found a copy at http://ekizo.mandarake.co.jp/shop/en/search.do?action=itemInfo&selectedItemIndex=27511&dt=1089650385430[url][/url]

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 3:56 pm what is the redcross book...i heard that it was distributed at the movie showings or something...

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Mon Jul 12, 2004 8:07 pm "The Red Cross Book was on sale in theatres that were playing The End of Evangelion in Japan. The book is important because it contains not only a Glossary of terms, Production Notes, and Commentary, but because it was put out by Gainax itself. It therefor stands as Gainax's (final?) statement on Evangelion, and helps to clear up some of the nagging questions and mysteries of the series." From http://www.evangelion.ca/rcb.html Eva Monkey, when you manage to procure extra copies of The Red Cross Book, I'll gladly buy one.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 8:39 pm id love a Red cross book and 2015 ill be happy tp pay you ^______^

Article: 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
 I've ever seen 2015 available are convention dealer rooms, occasionally on Ebay, and at JPQueen. I got mine for about 50 bucks, shipping included. JPQueen actually has a lot of rare Eva books and doujinshi, worth taking a look at, you might see something you like. http://www.jpqueen.com/ Also, as I convention around a lot, I'm considering actually purchasing these rare books at cons and then selling them to you, the reader, as a service to you, as a way of saying, "Thanks for the support". And by selling, I mean paying for what I would pay, plus shipping. Anyone interested? I'm going to Otakon in three weeks, there is definitely bound to be several copies of 2015, maybe some Red Cross Books....
